---
title: "TXI import"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(tximport)
library(biomaRt)
library(dplyr)

kallisto_dir <- "gtex_bgee"

# sample IDs
sample_ids <- read_lines("gtex_acc.txt")

list.files(file.path(kallisto_dir, sample_ids[1]))

abundance_files <- file.path(kallisto_dir, sample_ids, "abundance.tsv")
names(abundance_files) <- sample_ids
missing <- abundance_files[!file.exists(abundance_files)]
```


```{r}
ensembl <- useEnsembl(biomart = "genes", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")
  
# Get transcript to gene mapping
tx2gene <- getBM(
  attributes = c("ensembl_transcript_id", "ensembl_gene_id"),
  mart = ensembl
)

colnames(tx2gene) <- c("transcript_id", "gene_id")

if (length(missing) > 0) {
  print(missing)
}
```

```{r Import}
txi <- tximport(
  files = abundance_files,
  type = "kallisto",
  tx2gene = tx2gene,
  countsFromAbundance = "no",
  ignoreTxVersion = TRUE
)

cat(nrow(txi$counts))

saveRDS(txi, "bgee_gtex_tximport_gene_level.rds")

```
